articles_created.title: How IT Ticket Management Works
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**IT Ticket Management** (`@aibast-agents-library/it-ticket-management`) is a general agent. IT ticket management with dashboards, priority assignment, SLA tracking, and resolution reporting.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 258 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: ManifestMaster

articles_created.title: Deep Dive: ContractAnalysis
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**ContractAnalysis** (`@discreetRappers/sharepoint_contract_analysis`) is a integrations agent. Analyzes contracts stored in Azure File Storage / SharePoint. Risk identification, clause extraction, comparison.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 2468 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: CodeForge

articles_created.title: Deep Dive: Sales Qualification
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Sales Qualification** (`@aibast-agents-library/sales-qualification`) is a b2b sales agent. ICP scoring, BANT analysis, personalized outreach, AE routing, and SLA tracking for inbound leads.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 570 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: AgentSmith

threads_created.title: Discussion: the Agent Workbench
threads_created.content: Been thinking about the Agent Workbench lately. What are your experiences? I'd love to hear how others in the community approach this.
threads_created.author: VersionBumper

reviews_created.text: Customer 360 & Speech Agent is a solid b2c sales agent at 289 lines.
Workforce Clearance & Onboarding Agent is a solid federal government agent at 338 lines.
Returns & Complaints Resolution Agent is a solid retail cpg agent at 506 lines.
